title: iPhone Contacts to Monday Board
excerpt: My CEO is constantly adding new leads to his contacts on his iPhone. I would like a way to automatically add the contact to Monday.com sales CRM when he enters a new contact. Anyone have any idea of how I can do this?

posts.author: mimi (Mimi Fishman)
posts.cookedHtml: My CEO is constantly adding new leads to his contacts on his iPhone. I would like a way to automatically add the contact to Monday.com sales CRM when he enters a new contact. Anyone have any idea of how I can do this?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Mimi!

At this time we don’t have a native integration to sync contacts from iphone to the platform. We encourage you to submit this as a feature request here to increase visibility and votes! That said, if you can export the iphone contacts, you could then import them as items in your board.
